name: Nori
story: Nori and his sister Miso were rescued from a construction site. He hides for the first ten minutes, then melts into the nearest blanket.
He gains confidence from his sister — they are a bonded pair and must be adopted together. Watching them wrestle at 9 p.m. sharp is better than television.

medical.notes: Neuter scheduled with our partner clinic; included in the adoption fee.

photoAlt: Nori, a tiny grey tabby kitten with a sleepy, unimpressed face
